steps.screen:
[23CIt is written in the Book of Odin:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[27CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[27Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[27Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[27CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[23CYour god Odin seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[23Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[23CYou, a newly trained Stripling, have been heralded
[23Cfrom birth as the instrument of Odin.  You are destined
[23Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[23Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[23Cof us all:  Go bravely with Odin!
[23C--More--




Wizard the Stripling[11CSt:18/07 Dx:10 Co:18 In:10 Wi:8 Ch:8 Neutral
Dlvl:1 $:0 HP:16(16) Pw:2(2) AC:0 Xp:1

engravings.text: This way to the crypt
Here lies the left foot of Jack, killed by a land mine.  Let us know if you find any more of him
Tu quoque, Brute?
He died today....  May we rest in peace!
Here lies the left foot of Jack, killed by a land mine.  Let us know if you find any more of him
I will not go quietly.
Can you believe that thing is STILL moving?
No matter where I went, here I am.
The Grave of the Unknown Hacker
Gawd, it's depressing in here, isn't it?
Just doing my job here
...and they made me engrave my own headstone too!
Ignore me... I'm just here for my looks!
Some people have it dead easy, don't they?
And yes, it was ALL his fault!
Experience isn't everything.  First, you've got to survive.
Anything worth doing is worth overdoing.
Even The Dead pay taxes (and they aren't Grateful).
Come back here!  I'll bite your bloody knees off!
Cross my fingers for me.
Could you please take a breath mint?
Weep not, he is at rest
